name: SearXNG

pricing.details: Free. Self-host or use a public instance. No single entity controls all instances.

description: Open-source, self-hostable meta-search engine that aggregates results from multiple sources without logging or profiling users. Privacy properties depend on the instance operator.
rationale: SearXNG provides the strongest privacy guarantee of any search tool when self-hosted: no query data leaves your own infrastructure. When using a public instance, trust is delegated to the instance operator. No account or registration is required. Results are aggregated from multiple engines (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, etc.) without passing user-identifying information upstream. Usability varies by instance configuration. Recommended for technically capable users who prefer infrastructure control over convenience.
